audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + bị + ailment]]. Use bị before an illness or problem to say that someone is adversely affected by it. This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + nên + V]]. Use nên before an action to give practical advice about what someone should do.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + bị + ailment]]: Bị introduces an adverse affected-subject construction; with ailment nouns it presents the subject as experiencing an unwanted condition. This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + nên + V]]: Nên is a modal of recommendation followed by a bare predicate; it is weaker than an obligation marker.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + bị + ailment

Use bị before an illness or problem to say that someone is adversely affected by it. Example: [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam bị đau đầu.]]

#### S + nên + V

Use nên before an action to give practical advice about what someone should do. Example: [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam nên nghỉ.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + bị + ailment

Bị introduces an adverse affected-subject construction; with ailment nouns it presents the subject as experiencing an unwanted condition. Literal example: [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam bị đau đầu.]]

#### S + nên + V

Nên is a modal of recommendation followed by a bare predicate; it is weaker than an obligation marker. Literal example: [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam nên nghỉ.]]

audienceSections.normal: Bị is not a mechanically interchangeable passive marker; here it marks an unwanted condition. Nên gives advice rather than a command.
audienceSections.expert: Bị is not a mechanically interchangeable passive marker; here it marks an unwanted condition. Nên gives advice rather than a command. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam bị đau đầu.]] — Lê Hoàng Nam has a headache.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà bị sốt.]] — Trần Thu Hà has a fever.
- [[grammar:Bác sĩ ở phòng.]] — The doctor is in the room.
- [[grammar:Bác sĩ có thuốc.]] — The doctor has medicine.
- [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam nên nghỉ.]] — Lê Hoàng Nam should rest.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà nên uống nước.]] — Trần Thu Hà should drink water.
- [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam muốn khỏe.]] — Lê Hoàng Nam wants to be well.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà cũng muốn khỏe.]] — Trần Thu Hà also wants to be well.
- [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam uống thuốc.]] — Lê Hoàng Nam takes medicine.
- [[grammar:Bác sĩ kiểm tra Trần Thu Hà.]] — The doctor examines Trần Thu Hà.

- [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam nên nghỉ.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 1.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà nên uống nước.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 2.
- [[grammar:Lê Hoàng Nam muốn khỏe.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 3.
